title: paspalum ligulare
intro: Paspalum ligulare, also known as Paspalum grass or paspalidium, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum ligulare include its potential to help manage diabetes, inflammation, and respiratory problems, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of Paspalum ligulare is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
